---
title: "test_hud_box_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_hud_box_empire.py"
loc: 19
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.42
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.22
---

## Intent
The `test_hud_box_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_hud_box. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_hud_box. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `test_hud_box`
